scope_summary: Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with: a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N new, Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+D delete), notes persisted to a JSON file with title/body

Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with: a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N new, Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+D delete), notes persisted to a JSON file with title/body

Build a terminal notepad application using the Textual library. The application should have a TUI with:

1. A sidebar listing all notes.
2. A main editor pane for syntax-free text editing.
3. Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N to create new note, Ctrl+S to save current note, and Ctrl+D to delete selected no

Implement a Python module `adder.py` containing a function `add(a: int, b: int) -> int` that returns the sum of two integers. Include a `test_adder.py` with pytest tests covering positive numbers, negative numbers, and zero.
